rationale: Both papers are in charitable giving/nonprofit contexts, but their focal constructs differ substantially: the citing paper centers on autonomous vs. immediate aid framing and an impact→hope mechanism, while the cited paper focuses on moral identity discrepancy, priming, and gender. The only linkage evidence provided is a single DOI-level matched reference (reference_index 52) with no in-text citation context or unstructured reference details. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only, but substantive use is also not clearly established.
